title: Claude Fable 5 is Now BANNED?!
summary: Cole Medin discusses the sudden withdrawal of Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 model following a US government export-control directive allegedly triggered by a claimed jailbreak. The video covers the regulatory decision, performance benchmarks Medin conducted before the model was pulled, and implications for developers building on LLMs.
writeup: Cole Medin examines the abrupt withdrawal of Anthropic's Claude Fable 5, which followed a US government export-control directive reportedly prompted by a claimed jailbreak. The video walks through the regulatory decision and presents benchmarks Medin ran before the model was pulled, then weighs what the removal means for developers building on LLMs. Key takeaways: a single jailbreak claim can trigger export controls that take a model offline, and teams relying on a specific model face continuity risk when access can be revoked.
